offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, payroll tax compliance issues cause late filings and potential penalties. We automate tax calculations and filings instead of manual calculations and filing by HR teams.
problem: Difficulty in managing payroll tax compliance accurately and on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage on Indie Hackers discussions about tax compliance
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try Filing reminders and reporting dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
